seo.title: JKT48Connect for Developers — REST API, TypeScript SDK, Real-time Data
seo.description: JKT48Connect is the JKT48 data API built for developers. TypeScript SDK, REST API, real-time live streams, member profiles, theater schedules, and event data. Free tier available, no scraping needed.

hero.heading: JKT48 Data API for Developers
hero.subheading: A unified REST API for JKT48 data — member profiles, live streams, theater schedules, events, news, and birthdays. TypeScript SDK included. Free tier available. No scraping, no maintenance, no guesswork.

problem.title: Why building JKT48 apps is painful without JKT48Connect
problem.intro: Every JKT48 fan developer has hit the same wall — getting reliable data is a full-time job before you even start building.

items.title: Scraping breaks constantly
items.description: Build a scraper today, watch it fail next week when the source site updates its layout. You spend more time maintaining scrapers than building the actual app.

items.title: Data is scattered everywhere
items.description: Member profiles are on the official site. Theater schedules are in the app. Live stream data is on IDN and Showroom separately. News is on social media. There's no single source of truth.

items.title: No official developer API
items.description: JKT48 platforms don't provide public APIs for developers. Fan wikis and community databases exist but are manually maintained, incomplete, and not built for programmatic access.

items.title: Inconsistent data formats
items.description: Even when you manage to pull data from multiple sources, the formats are different — different date formats, different member name spellings, different ID schemes. Normalizing it all takes weeks.

features.title: Built the way developers expect
features.intro: JKT48Connect is TypeScript-first, REST API-driven, and designed to integrate cleanly into any fan project or production app.

items.title: TypeScript SDK
items.description: Official TypeScript SDK with full type safety, autocomplete for all endpoints, and documented response types. Install via npm and start fetching data in minutes.

items.title: REST API for everything
items.description: Every data type has a dedicated endpoint — members, live streams, theater schedules, events, news, and birthdays. Consistent response schemas across all endpoints.

items.title: Real-time live stream data
items.description: IDN Live and Showroom viewer counts updated in real-time. Stream start and end events detected within seconds. YouTube (JKT48V) included.

items.title: Versioned endpoints
items.description: All endpoints are versioned (/v1/). Breaking changes never silently affect your integration. Deprecation notices are given in advance.

items.title: Webhook support
items.description: Register webhook URLs to receive POST requests when members go live, events are announced, or new news is published. Build event-driven apps without polling.

items.title: Free tier available
items.description: 1.000 API calls per month on the free tier — no credit card required. Upgrade to Pro for 100.000 calls/month with real-time latency and webhooks.

items.title: Normalized data model
items.description: Consistent member IDs, date formats, and field names across all endpoints. A member_id from the Members API works in live stream, theater, event, and news endpoints.

items.title: Cross-platform aggregation
items.description: IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube data are normalized into unified response schemas — one integration covers all platforms.

items.title: Historical data access
items.description: Recent live streams, past theater shows, historical news, and completed events are all queryable — not just current data.

benefits.title: Why developers choose JKT48Connect
benefits.intro: Stop building infrastructure. Start building features.

items.title: Skip weeks of data work
items.description: No scraping setup, no normalization, no maintenance. JKT48Connect handles all the data collection so you can focus on building your app from day one.

items.title: Integrate in minutes
items.description: npm install jkt48connect-sdk, add your API key, and start fetching member data. The TypeScript SDK has autocomplete for every endpoint and response type.

items.title: Never break on source changes
items.description: JKT48Connect abstracts the source data layer. When JKT48's website updates, we fix it — your integration keeps working without any changes on your end.

items.title: One API key, all data
items.description: Members, live streams, theater schedules, events, news, birthdays — all from one API key and one base URL. No juggling multiple service accounts or platform credentials.

items.title: Production-ready from day one
items.description: Rate limiting, authentication, versioning, and 99.9% uptime SLA on Pro plans. Build fan projects or production apps with the same confidence.

items.title: Community-driven roadmap
items.description: New endpoints and data types are prioritized based on what fan developers actually need. Pro subscribers get input on the roadmap.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Technical questions from developers evaluating JKT48Connect.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Register at jkt48connect.com to get a free API key. Install the TypeScript SDK via npm install jkt48connect or call the REST endpoints directly. The free tier gives you 1.000 API calls/month with no credit card required. Full documentation is at jkt48connect.com/docs.

items.question: Is there a TypeScript SDK?
items.answer: Yes. The official TypeScript SDK covers all JKT48Connect endpoints with full type definitions and autocomplete. Install via npm. The SDK is compatible with Node.js, browser environments, and edge runtimes.

items.question: How does the real-time live stream data work?
items.answer: JKT48Connect continuously monitors IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube for JKT48 member streams. Viewer counts are updated with sub-10 second latency on Pro plans. Stream start and end events trigger webhooks within seconds of detection.

items.question: What's the rate limit?
items.answer: Free tier: 10 requests/minute, 1.000 calls/month. Pro tier: 300 requests/minute, 100.000 calls/month. Enterprise: custom limits. Rate limit headers are included in every response so you can track usage programmatically.

items.question: Can I use JKT48Connect in a production app?
items.answer: Yes. Pro and Enterprise plans include 99.9% uptime SLA, versioned endpoints with advance deprecation notices, and priority support. JKT48Connect is designed for production fan apps and fansites, not just prototypes.

items.question: Can I call the API from the browser?
items.answer: Yes, but we recommend proxying API calls through your backend to avoid exposing your API key in client-side code. The REST API supports CORS for browser requests. For server-side rendering with Next.js or similar frameworks, call the API from your server-side functions.

items.question: How do webhooks work?
items.answer: Register a webhook URL via the dashboard or API. Specify which events to watch (member_live_start, member_live_end, new_news, new_event, etc.). JKT48Connect sends a POST request to your URL with a JSON payload when the event occurs. Webhook payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 for verification. Available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

items.question: What happens when JKT48's source sites change?
items.answer: JKT48Connect monitors for data source changes and updates our integration layer when source sites change structure. Your API integration is unaffected — that's the core value of using JKT48Connect over building your own scraper.
